description: Configure the 'Senator Mix Survey' campaign (ID: SENMIX) to proportionally dial leads from three regional lists by creating and activating a List Mix named 'REGIONAL_BLEND'. The mix must include List 9301 at 50%, List 9302 at 30%, and List 9303 at 20%. Update the 'SENMIX' campaign settings to utilize this List Mix for dialing. Use credentials User: 6666, Pass: andromeda.
